title: elsholtzia eriostachya var. pusilla
intro: Elsholtzia eriostachya var. pusilla, also known as the small perennial Elsholtzia, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been reported to possess health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Elsholtzia eriostachya var. pusilla are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments.
